name: Frijoles a La Charra
recipeIngredient: 3 jalapeno chiles, stems and seeds removed, diced
1 quart cooked pinto beans and juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crispy.
2. Add jalapenos and onion; sauté until onions are translucent.
3. Stir in the cooked beans with their juices, diced tomatoes, garlic powder, and black pepper.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Stir in cilantro before serving.
